role: This file is the tldraw custom-shape module that renders corpus-search hit circles ('forager' shapes) on the canvas and provides their creation, deduplication, placement, clearing, and selection-read utilities.
capabilities: custom 'forager' circle tldraw shape with Circle2d geometry
stable shape id generation by hashing corpus address
label extraction from hit head JSON or address tail
semantic zoom detail expansion at zoom > 0.5
chip-hidden state via opacity 0 with collapsed geometry
deduplicated re-hit pulse via keyed remount on hits prop
viewport-centered loose-grid placement with slot-occupancy check
clear all forager shapes without touching graph nodes
selection hook reading selected forager shapes from the editor
substance_why: It implements a full ShapeUtil with geometry, component, indicator, label resolution, a deterministic placement/dedupe algorithm, a clear function, and a selection hook, all with detailed behavioral comments.
interactions_present: native tldraw select/drag/delete on forager circles (coexistence with node shapes)
semantic zoom reveals kind/session/head when zoom > 0.5
re-hit deduplication triggers a pulse animation via keyed remount
programmatic placement of search-hit circles near viewport center
programmatic clear of all forager shapes
useForagerSelection hook exposes selected circles to other components
data-ui-ref attribute enables external indicate(address) highlighting
interactions_missing: no in-component click handler to call indicate(address) directly
no UI control wired to clear forager shapes
no interaction to open/navigate to the corpus record address
no drag-and-drop or conversion handoff from circles to graph nodes
no in-file filtering/chipping UI (only reacts to external opacity prop)
resize and rotate are intentionally disabled
performance_risks: placeForagerHits occupancy check is O(hits × (existing+placed)) with up to 400 guard iterations per hit, risking slowdown with many hits or existing circles
foragerLabelFromHit parses JSON and scans object values for every hit and re-hit
every forager component subscribes to editor zoom individually via useValue
getGeometry recomputes a new Circle2d on every opacity record change
reuse_why: The domain behavior—dedupe-by-address, score-tinted ring, semantic zoom, viewport placement, coexistence rules, and selection readout—is fully specified and should be preserved, but the tldraw ShapeUtil form and React component will be rebuilt in the redesign.
decomposition_hints: split shape rendering (ForagerShapeUtil/component/indicator/geometry) from data loading (placeForagerHits, clearForagerShapes) and selection hook
extract label resolution (foragerLabel, foragerLabelFromHit) into a shared corpus-address presentation utility
extract the placement/grid algorithm into a separate canvas-layout service
separate animation/pulse behavior from the shape component
